meta.title: Motion Interaction Catalog
meta.description: Deduplicated motion patterns categorized by interaction trigger and target object. Each pattern includes on-site feel, source excerpts, and slow-calm vs fast-playful timing. Use with mood-to-motion-map for feeling → pace.

interactionTriggers.label: Page load / first paint
interactionTriggers.description: Runs once when the page or hero mounts; often staggered across children.

interactionTriggers.label: Scroll into view (once)
interactionTriggers.description: Fires when element crosses viewport threshold; does not repeat.

interactionTriggers.label: Scroll-scrubbed
interactionTriggers.description: Progress tied 1:1 to scroll position (GSAP scrub, Framer useScroll).

interactionTriggers.label: Scroll-driven progress
interactionTriggers.description: Opacity/color/transform mapped to scroll ranges without strict scrub.

interactionTriggers.label: Pointer hover
interactionTriggers.description: Mouse enter/leave on interactive or card surfaces.

interactionTriggers.label: Open / close toggle
interactionTriggers.description: Menus, modals, fleet panels, tab overlays.

interactionTriggers.label: Timer / interval
interactionTriggers.description: Carousels, tab cycles, loaders, rotating copy.

interactionTriggers.label: Ambient loop
interactionTriggers.description: Infinite CSS/JS loops: marquees, video breath, text shine.

interactionTriggers.label: Cursor-driven
interactionTriggers.description: Magnetic elements, masks, ripples, GIF trails follow pointer.

patterns.name: Fade rise up
patterns.feel: Element starts invisible and slightly below final position, then eases up into place. Smooth and unobtrusive—cards, paragraphs, buttons feel polished without stealing focus.
sourceExcerpts: @keyframes fadeInUp: opacity 0, translateY(30px) → opacity 1, translateY(0); .animate-fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards.
useInView: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out, staggered delays 0.1–0.5s per element, threshold 0.1.
popup-card-in: opacity 0, translateY(16px) scale(0.96) → full; delay i * 150ms.

fastPlayful.mood: startup landing, social app, promo grid

patterns.name: Sequential block stagger
patterns.feel: Same upward fade as fade-rise-up, but blocks appear in order (badge → title → body → CTA). Page reads like a short opening beat, not everything popping at once.
sourceExcerpts: fade-rise: translateY(24px) + opacity; classes .animate-fade-rise, -delay 0.2s, -delay-2 0.4s.
blurFadeUp stagger: logo 0ms, nav 100–300ms, title 400ms, buttons 600–900ms.
Digitwist: pre-headline y 20→0; headline scale 0.9→1 delay 0.2s; subhead opacity delay 0.4s; buttons y delay 0.6s.

slowCalm.mood: resort brand, focus tool, film hero

fastPlayful.mood: consumer app, event page, bold marketing

patterns.name: Opacity fade (no travel)
patterns.feel: Opacity 0→1 only—no slide. Minimal and confident; content simply appears. For tab swaps, overlay content, or deck crossfades.
sourceExcerpts: fade-in keyframe: opacity 0 → 1, 0.5s ease-out forwards.
fadeInOverlay: opacity 0 → 1, 0.4s ease-out.
Deck: opacity isActive ? 1 : 0, duration 0.35 easeInOut.

patterns.name: Blur reveal
aliases: Vimeo background blur on fleet open
patterns.feel: Heavy blur and low opacity resolve to sharp text or imagery—attention arriving, like rack focus or waking from a dream. Deck metadata and hero subtitles use lighter blur (8px); heroes use stronger (20px).
sourceExcerpts: fade-up: translateY(20px) + blur(4px) → clear, 700ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1).
BlurIn viewport: blur(20px) opacity 0 → blur(0) opacity 1 over 1.2s.
BlurReveal motion.div: blur(8px) opacity 0 → clear, 0.9s, delays 0.05–1.2s.

slowCalm.mood: biotech, meditation, enterprise AI, investor deck

fastPlayful.mood: consumer AI, agency launch, pitch energy

patterns.name: Fade down enter
patterns.feel: Content enters from slightly above final position while fading in—opposite of rise-up. Subtitles and CTAs settle gently under the main headline.
sourceExcerpts: FadeDown: opacity 0, y: -20 → opacity 1, y: 0, duration 0.6s, configurable delay, once in view.

patterns.name: Typography mask slide (curtain)
patterns.feel: Each line or word sits in overflow-hidden; inner text slides up from 100% masked—like blinds opening. Editorial, presentation-forward.
sourceExcerpts: SlideUpLine: inner motion.span y 100% → 0%, 0.7s, ease [0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1].
WordByWordReveal: per-word mask, stagger 0.035s, duration 0.55s.

slowCalm.mood: investor keynote, film title, documentary narration

patterns.name: Typography stagger (letter / word)
patterns.feel: Title built unit-by-unit: letters fade or slide; words rise with blur clearing; reading rhythm is guided—headline becomes performance without full mask curtain.
sourceExcerpts: StaggeredFade: per letter opacity 0→1, delay i * 0.03s, duration 0.3s.
BlurText: per word blur(10px)→0, y 50→0, 0.35s, stagger 100ms.
SplitText: words y 40→0, opacity, 0.08s stagger, 0.6s duration.
WordsPullUp: word y 20→0, opacity, stagger 0.08s, useInView once.

slowCalm.mood: mindful editorial, climate brand, gallery hero

fastPlayful.mood: viral agency, growth SaaS, streetwear drop

patterns.name: Scroll-driven text highlight
patterns.feel: Words or letters brighten as you scroll—highlighter following read pace. Long quotes and manifestos feel guided; clip-path fill variant paints brand gradient left-to-right.
sourceExcerpts: Per word: scroll range → opacity [0.2, 1], color dark gray → white; offset start end / end center.
ScrollRevealText: offset start 0.9 / start 0.3, opacity 0.15 → 1 per word.
AnimatedLetter: charProgress range → opacity 0.2 to 1.
TextFill: clipPath inset driven by scroll 80%–20% viewport.

fastPlayful.mood: karaoke highlight, rally speech, progress-bar race

patterns.name: Scroll parallax (layered)
patterns.feel: Foreground text rises and fades while background image/video moves slower—depth on scroll. Hero exit variant: first screen translates up and fades as next section scales in.
sourceExcerpts: Hero text y [0,-200] opacity [1,0] first 50% scroll; dashboard y [0,-250].
ContentFlow: opacity max(1 - progress*2.5,0); translateY progress*-60; showcase scale 0.88→1.
Portfolio cards: targetScale 1 - (total-index)*0.03 sticky stack.

fastPlayful.mood: mobile app, bold product site, fast portfolio shuffle

patterns.name: Scroll-scrubbed media
patterns.feel: Video time or panel position locked to scroll—user scrubs the timeline. Glass panel rises from bottom at section end like a chapter card landing.
sourceExcerpts: ScrollTrigger scrub: targetTime = progress * duration, seek throttling.
GlassPanel: gsap panel y 100% → 0%, scrub 1.5, trigger container end.
ScrollFloat: chars opacity 1→0, yPercent 0→250, scaleY 1→1.2, scrub 1.5.

fastPlayful.mood: interactive game demo, snappy chapter break

patterns.name: Cinematic section transition
patterns.feel: Full-viewport sections swap with blur, scale, and vertical shift—hard cut energy like a lens change. Distinct from simple opacity crossfade.
sourceExcerpts: Enter: opacity 0→1, scale 1.05→1, blur 10px→0 (0.8s). Exit: scale 0.92, blur 12px, y -60. Sections y 80→0, scale 1.08→1, blur 14px→0.

patterns.name: Media crossfade (chapter videos)
patterns.feel: Stacked fullscreen videos; active chapter fades in ~700ms while others fade out—atmosphere shifts without black frames.
sourceExcerpts: Three fixed videos: transition-opacity duration-700, active opacity-100 others opacity-0.

patterns.name: Breathing video loop
patterns.feel: Background video never hard-cuts: fades out at loop end, fades in at start—page feels alive, slow breath.
sourceExcerpts: FADE_DURATION 0.5s rAF: first 0.5s fade up, last 0.5s fade down; on ended reset currentTime, play. Variants 250–500ms.

patterns.name: Infinite horizontal marquee
patterns.feel: Brand row moves endlessly; duplicated list hides seam. Gradient masks at edges—social proof without grabbing focus.
sourceExcerpts: @keyframes scroll translateX(0)→translateX(-50%), 15s mobile / 30s desktop linear infinite.
GSAP xPercent -50, duration 40, repeat -1. InfiniteSlider motion/react horizontal.

patterns.name: Infinite vertical marquee
patterns.feel: Image columns scroll up/down continuously—product wall or inspiration grid with top/bottom fade masks.
sourceExcerpts: marquee translateY(0)→translateY(-50%), marquee-reverse 30s linear infinite; 4 images repeated per column.

patterns.name: Panel slide in
patterns.feel: Product mock or wizard card enters from side or below after hero—classic product reveal beat. Fleet columns stagger from right on open.
sourceExcerpts: .dashboard-animate slide-in-right 0.9s delay 1.2s from translateX(40px).
animate-slide-up-overlay: opacity + translate centered, 0.5s.
Fleet columns x 100vw → 0, delay i*0.1, duration 1.56.

patterns.name: Chart draw & data reveal
patterns.feel: Line charts self-draw via stroke-dashoffset; area and dots follow. Stat cards rise in with index stagger on slide activation.
sourceExcerpts: stroke-dashoffset transition 1.8s; area opacity 800ms; dot scale-in 1600ms.
StatCard y 30 opacity 0 → y 0 opacity 1, delay 0.6 + index*0.1.

patterns.name: Hover micro-feedback
patterns.feel: Subtle scale, lift, shadow, fill, or magnetic pull on pointer—affordance without page-level choreography.
sourceExcerpts: hover:scale-[1.03], whileHover scale 1.03–1.05.
Card: translateY(-4px), shadow deepen.
Nav pill: circle scale 3, label swap 0.3s.
Magnet: strength 3, padding 150, transition 0.3s active.
Shimmer border: backgroundPosition 0→200% 0.8s.

patterns.name: Press / active feedback
patterns.feel: Button depresses or shrinks on click—physical switch affordance.
sourceExcerpts: Duolingo active: box-shadow removed, translateY(4px). Sentinel active:scale-[0.97].

patterns.name: Menu & overlay open
patterns.feel: Navigation takes over screen: circular mask expands from corner, or menu pills pop in with bounce stagger.
sourceExcerpts: clipPath circle(0% at 80px 40px) → circle(150%), 0.7s ease [0.76, 0, 0.24, 1].
Bubbles scale 0→1, labels y 24→0, stagger 0.12s, back.out(1.5).

patterns.name: Auto-cycle content
patterns.feel: Tabs, testimonials, or hero words advance on timer—passive product tour or brand personality before interaction.
sourceExcerpts: Stellar AI tabs setInterval 4s.
Carousel 3s interval pause on hover, exit fade+scale.
Loader: words cycle 900ms, counter 000→100 rAF 2.7s.
roles cycle 2s animate-fade-in key={roleIndex}.

fastPlayful.mood: TV ad reel, slot machine, arcade attract

patterns.name: Deck slide transition
patterns.feel: Whole slide crossfades or slides horizontally with scale—pitch deck behavior; remount replays inner animations.
sourceExcerpts: opacity isActive 0.35s easeInOut; activationCount remounts.
enter x ±100% opacity 0 scale 0.95; exit x ±30% duration 0.65s ease [0.4,0,0.2,1].

patterns.name: Cursor reveal effects
patterns.feel: Pointer unveils video under image mask, leaves glass ripples, or spawns rotating GIF stamps—exploratory, agency-playful.
sourceExcerpts: Flashlight: 6 lag circles, SVG radialGradient mask on image over video.
Liquid: 80 ripples spawn distance>25px, age+=0.012, backdropFilter liquid-trail.
Partner: spawn GIF at cursor every 80ms, fade 1000ms, rotation ±10deg.

patterns.name: Ambient text surface effects
patterns.feel: Continuous gradient sweep on emphasis words, or layered blur neon glow—Crypto/Web3 or glass UI chrome. Liquid-glass is often static blur+border; pair with hover scale for motion.
sourceExcerpts: ShinyText: framer gradient sweep 3s, backgroundClip text.
Neon: two absolute spans blur-sm/md gradient masks.
.liquid-glass backdrop-filter blur(4px) gradient border mask — 40+ prompts.
patterns.notes: liquid-glass alone = visual style; combine with fade-rise-up or hover-micro for motion.

fastPlayful.mood: disco type, arcade neon, acrylic toy

patterns.name: Scroll indicator pulse
patterns.feel: Small dot travels down a thin line—gentle nudge to scroll without copy.
sourceExcerpts: @keyframes scroll-down translateY(-100%)→200% 1.5s ease-in-out infinite.

patterns.name: Media poster handoff
patterns.feel: Poster image holds until video actually plays, then fades—no flash of black. Many heroes are video-led with minimal UI motion.
sourceExcerpts: Video poster fades once playing starts. Numerous: autoPlay loop muted playsInline object-cover HLS/MP4 absolute inset-0.

lookupMatrix.description: Quick routing: trigger × object → pattern ids (primary first).

nonMotionReferences.note: Brandly hero and similar prompts explicitly specify no animation—layout and typography only.
Liquid glass is primarily visual (blur, border, inset shadow). Pair with motion patterns rather than treating as standalone animation.

removedDuplicatesLog: Merged fadeInUp + useInView fade-in-up + popup-card-in + Prisma feature card scale into fade-rise-up family
Merged plain fade + fadeInOverlay + deck opacity into opacity-fade
Merged BlurIn + BlurReveal + blur-fade-up + fade-up blur into blur-reveal
Merged StaggeredFade + SplitText + BlurText + WordsPullUp + VEX char stagger into typography-stagger-units
Merged reading highlight + ScrollRevealText + AnimatedLetter + text fill into scroll-text-highlight
Merged horizontal marquees (CSS, GSAP footer, InfiniteSlider) into infinite-marquee-horizontal
Merged hover scale + card lift + nav pill + service card + shimmer + glow + magnetic into hover-micro-feedback
Merged dashboard slide + slide-up-overlay + fleet columns into panel-slide-in
Merged chart draw + investor stat cards into chart-draw-reveal
Merged tab auto-cycle + testimonial carousel + word loader + rotating roles into auto-cycle-content
Merged slide fade + Pro AI horizontal deck into deck-slide-transition
Merged flashlight + liquid trail + GIF trail into cursor-reveal-effects
Merged ShinyText + Neon + liquid-glass notes into ambient-text-surface
